title: Topa Kiang Lo Koi Ka Pai Diam?

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna dim hih lei-ah ka nuntakna,
Ka kha buk na’ng mun zong dingin,
Topa kiang lo, koi ka pai diam?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka kha buk na’ng mun zong dingin;
Topa kiang lo, koi ka pai diam?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I it lawmte khempeuhte ke’n it
I lung sung ah kingil thei lo;
Ka kha a’dingin kha an kisam ing,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nun in nuam e hiah i it lawmte tawh,
Sihna daitui ka tal-ah hong kai ciang,
Topa kiang lo, koi ka pai diam?
